name: zentro-business-kb
description: Ground the Zentro reasoning agent in governed operating policies and the Zentro Fabric IQ business ontology.
answerInstructions: Answer only from retrieved evidence. Explain the business state, cite the sources used, and recommend a governed next action. Say when evidence is insufficient.
retrievalInstructions: For business state, entities, metrics, and relationships, query the Zentro Fabric IQ ontology. For policies and playbooks, query the Zentro policies source. Combine both when recommending actions.
